# @platform/platform-errors

Typed error class hierarchy: AppError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, ConflictError, UnauthorizedError, ForbiddenError, InfrastructureError, UnexpectedError. Zero @platform dependencies.

Owner: team-platform

Semver policy: internal-traceable

## Responsibilities

- Define AppError base class with code, safeMessage, httpStatus, retryable, safeDetails, internalDetails
- Define typed error subclasses for all expected failure categories
- Provide HTTP status mapping per error type
- Provide safe API response serialisation shape

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not depend on HTTP frameworks (httpStatus is data, not express/fastify)
- Does not import or wrap any @platform package
- Does not log — logging is handled by the adapter/BFF layer
